description: Phase 4 — Common DNA. The recurring requirement primitives shared across management systems and frameworks. `present_in` lists standard IDs (from standards.json) where the requirement is explicit. `harmonization` notes the ISO Annex SL / Harmonized Structure (HS) clause where applicable. `similarity` (0-1) estimates cross-standard semantic overlap of how the requirement is expressed.
annex_sl_note: ISO management-system standards share Annex SL / Harmonized Structure (clauses 4-10): Context, Leadership, Planning, Support, Operation, Performance Evaluation, Improvement. This is the structural reason 60-80% of requirement text is reusable — the foundation of 'write once, certify many'.

requirements.name: Policy
requirements.definition: Top-management-approved policy stating intent and direction.

requirements.name: Roles, Responsibilities & Authorities
requirements.definition: Defined and communicated accountability for the system.

requirements.name: Context & Interested Parties
requirements.definition: Understanding internal/external issues and stakeholder needs.

requirements.name: Risk Assessment
requirements.definition: Identify, analyze and evaluate risks (and opportunities).

requirements.name: Objectives & Planning
requirements.definition: Measurable objectives and plans to achieve them.

requirements.name: Competence
requirements.definition: Ensure persons doing work are competent (education/training/experience).

requirements.name: Awareness & Training
requirements.definition: Personnel aware of policy, their contribution, and consequences.

requirements.name: Communication
requirements.definition: Internal & external communication relevant to the system.

requirements.name: Documented Information
requirements.definition: Create, control and retain documented information / records.

requirements.name: Operational Planning & Control
requirements.definition: Plan, implement and control processes to meet requirements.

requirements.name: Monitoring, Measurement & KPI
requirements.definition: Determine what/when/how to monitor and evaluate performance.

requirements.name: Evidence / Records of Conformity
requirements.definition: Retain objective evidence that controls operate as designed.

requirements.name: Internal Audit
requirements.definition: Conduct planned internal audits of the management system.

requirements.name: Management Review
requirements.definition: Top management reviews system suitability, adequacy, effectiveness.

requirements.name: Nonconformity & Corrective Action
requirements.definition: React to nonconformities, correct, and prevent recurrence.

requirements.name: Continual Improvement
requirements.definition: Continually improve suitability, adequacy and effectiveness.

requirements.name: Incident / Event Management
requirements.definition: Detect, respond to, and learn from incidents/events.

requirements.name: Impact Assessment (DPIA/AIA)
requirements.definition: Assess impacts on individuals/society (privacy, AI, environment).
